name: Martin Luther
title: Reformer & Theologian
bio: German professor of theology, priest, and seminal figure in the Protestant Reformation. His Ninety-five Theses challenged the Catholic Church's practices and launched the Reformation.
faith: Luther's rediscovery of justification by faith alone (sola fide) through Scripture alone (sola scriptura) transformed Christianity. His translation of the Bible into German made Scripture accessible to ordinary people.

sources.title: Martin Luther — Wikipedia
sources.note: Comprehensive biography of the father of the Reformation

sources.title: Ninety-five Theses — Wikipedia
sources.note: The document that launched the Protestant Reformation

sources.title: Martin Luther (2003 Film)

tagline: Here I stand — I can do no other
